family=qwen3_asr
variant=qwen3_asr
model_root=/home/vlapy/llama-cpp-studio/data/models/audio-cpp/Qwen3-ASR-0.6B
description=Qwen3 ASR loaded from local assets.
  Supported tasks:
    --task asr --mode offline
  Available input options:
    --audio <wav>
    --batch-audio-dir <dir>
    --audio-chunk-seconds <float>
    --audio-chunk-mode auto|fixed|vad|none
  Common output options:
    --out <wav>
    --out-dir <dir>
    --text-out <txt>
    --segments-out <json>
    --vad-chunks-out <json>
    --vad-chunk-max-seconds <float>
    --vad-chunk-merge-gap-seconds <float>
    --vad-chunk-padding-seconds <float>
    --turns-out <json>
    --words-out <json>
